description: Composition:Red and white ballerina flats made of mesh and synethic uppers and rubber outsolesThese ballerina flats from puma are the perfect mixture sneaker comfort and the light, airy feeling of a ballerina shoe. The mesh uppers with leather accents are both stylish and comfortable. The elastic strap enables easy removal and insertion of the foot. The textile lining and a cushioned footbed provide comfort. Two-tone rubber outsole gives good grip.
